problems.name: Sort Colors
problems.notes: didn't advance mid on the high-swap

problems.name: Longest Repeating Character Replacement
problems.notes: pinned to global-max char; track in-window maxFreq instead, validity = size - maxFreq <= k

problems.name: Search in Rotated Sorted Array
problems.notes: mid = l + (r-l)/2 (index anchored to l, not a bare offset). discriminator = which half is sorted via nums[l]<=nums[mid], then is target INSIDE that half's range — not target vs nums[mid]

problems.name: Koko Eating Bananas
problems.notes: BS on answer space [ceil(sum/h)..max(pile)], not on the array. feasible(k)=sum(ceil(p/k))<=h. monotonic so leftmost-true → return l. traps: sum() overflows Int (sumOf{toLong}); integer ceil (p+k-1)/k needs k>=1 guard
